message:
feat(config): add QuarantineConfig to SafetyConfig and wire through PolicyEngine

- Add QuarantineConfig struct (max_audit_events, auto_expire, default_severity)
  with serde(default) for backwards-compatible TOML deserialization
- Add QuarantineRegistry::from_config() constructor
- Wire quarantine config through PolicyEngine::from_safety_config()
- 3 new TOML integration tests: defaults, roundtrip, missing section fallback
- 40/40 quarantine-related tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
